plan_raw.summary: Rename a blueprint that doesn't exist

params.prompt: weapon that does|999999 damage

exec_results.dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_DamageWeapon
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Target]
NODE n3: SetVar [Variable=Damage, Value=999999]
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Damage set to 999999"]
NODE n5: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute

DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Value [Actor]
DATA n2.Value -> n3.Target [Actor]
